Name: Percentage of total case time spent in the SW-AE Assign Reviewers loop (from first to last assignment)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: The time between the first SW-AE Assign Reviewers and the SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and the subsequent reviewer response (Agreed/Declined/Unavailable)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time until a reviewer is agreed upon since the manuscript entered SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Time to secure two SW-Reviewer Agreed events since the initial SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average duration of SW-AE Assign Reviewers compared to RW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-AE Assign Reviewers and the end of the case

Name: Ratio of time spent in SW-AE Assign Reviewers to time spent in SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-AE Assign Reviewers and the end of the case

Name: Difference in SW-AE Assign Reviewers duration between cases with and without SW-Reviewer Unavailable events
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable occurs

Name: Time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-AE Recommendation overdue
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue'

Name: Average time for SW-AE Assign Reviewers in variants containing Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and the end of case where activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 occurs

Name: Total time invested in SW-AE Assign Reviewers before manuscript rejection (SW-EIC Reject)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-AE Assign Reviewers and the end of the case

Name: Time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers Challenge Paper to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers Challenge Paper' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
